channel.title: Supply Chain Disaster
channel.description: Supply chain management simulation game and learning hub. Play 10 chapters of real-world crisis scenarios, earn APICS CSCP prep knowledge, and master procurement, logistics, and risk management.

item.title: Why Your Supply Chain Risk Model Is Already Obsolete
item.description: Your supply chain dashboard shows green across the board. Every KPI is within tolerance. And somewhere, a typhoon is forming that will shut down three of your tier-two suppliers in 72 hours.

item.title: Why Reactive Risk Management No Longer Works
item.description: Your supply chain visibility dashboard shows green across the board. Your tier-one suppliers confirmed shipments yesterday. Then a government halfway around the world issues an export ban, and within 72 hours, your pr...

item.title: What the Great KitKat Heist of 2026 Tells Us About the State of Cargo Security
item.description: According to the Transported Asset Protection Association (TAPA EMEA), cargo theft in Europe surged 438% over a three-year period between 2022 and 2024. Their intelligence system recorded more than 157,000 cargo crime...

item.title: Supply Chain Disaster — Play the Game
item.description: A supply chain simulation game where you manage procurement, inventory, and logistics across 10 chapters of real-world crises. Free to play — no account required.

item.title: What Is a Supply Chain? A Complete Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about supply chains — from raw materials to end customers. Covers definitions, key concepts, disruption types, and how simulation helps you master them.

item.title: Best Business Simulation Games for Training
item.description: A ranked guide to the best business simulation games for supply chain and operations management training. Covers corporate, academic, and free-to-play options.

item.title: Supply Chain Simulation Guide — Strategy and Tactics
item.description: How to use supply chain simulation to make better decisions under pressure. Covers forecasting, safety stock, bullwhip effect, and crisis response strategy.

item.title: SCM Fundamentals: The 5 Pillars of Supply Chain Management
item.description: A deep-dive into the five SCOR pillars — Plan, Source, Make, Deliver, Return — and how to apply them when your supply chain is under crisis conditions.

item.title: 7Cs of Supply Chain & 4PL Logistics Explained
item.description: A practical breakdown of the 7Cs framework and 4PL logistics model — how to measure supply chain excellence and when to outsource orchestration.

item.title: Six Sigma & Kaizen in Supply Chain Management
item.description: How Six Sigma DMAIC and Kaizen continuous improvement apply to supply chain operations. Includes defect metrics, waste reduction, and real crisis case studies.

item.title: Supply Chain Management Game — Play Online
item.description: Play a free supply chain management game online. Make procurement and inventory decisions across 10 crisis scenarios and learn APICS CSCP concepts through play.

item.title: Supply Chain Disruption Simulation
item.description: A browser-based supply chain disruption simulation. Respond to port closures, demand spikes, supplier failures, and geopolitical crises in real time.

item.title: Procurement Simulation Game
item.description: Practice procurement decisions in a live simulation. Balance order quantities, lead times, and cash flow under supply disruptions across 10 interactive chapters.

item.title: 7 Strategies for Automotive Supply Chain Resilience
item.description: Operational frameworks to reduce exposure and accelerate recovery in an era of overlapping disruptions. Covers supplier data transparency, regional redundancy, hazard intelligence, and pre-negotiated contingency agreements for manufacturing firms.

item.title: Stop Underestimating Excel. It's Your Supply Chain's Secret Weapon.
item.description: 10 high-impact Excel use cases for supply chain professionals — demand forecasting, safety stock, ABC-XYZ analysis, supplier scorecards, landed cost modelling, BOM explosion, and scenario planning — with the formulas that make them work.

item.title: Lead Time Calculator
item.description: Free online lead time calculator for supply chain and procurement. Calculate total lead time, safety stock, and reorder points with step-by-step breakdowns.

item.title: Bullwhip Effect Calculator
item.description: Visualize and calculate the bullwhip effect in your supply chain. Enter demand variability at each tier and see how order amplification compounds upstream.

item.title: Pricing — Supply Chain Disaster
item.description: Unlock all 10 chapters of Supply Chain Disaster. Standard Edition ($14.99) covers chapters 1–8. Expansion Bundle ($25) adds chapters 9–10 with global crisis scenarios.

item.title: Blog — Supply Chain Disaster
item.description: Articles, guides, and resources on supply chain management, APICS CSCP certification prep, procurement strategy, and logistics operations.

item.title: About — Supply Chain Disaster
item.description: About Supply Chain Disaster — why we built a crisis simulation game to teach real supply chain concepts, and who it is designed for.
